title: `ENGINE = Backup` causes Syntax error on `SELECT engine_full FROM system.databases`
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
When a database is created using the [Backup](https://clickhouse.com/docs/engines/database-engines/backup) engine, attempting to `SELECT engine_full FROM system.databases` fails.
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
Add a backup destination of any kind (I've seen the error on at least File and S3).
```yaml
# config.yaml
storage_configuration:
disks:
backups:
type: local
path: /var/backups/
backups:
allowed_disk: backups
allowed_path: /var/backups/
send_crash_reports:
enabled: true
```
Create a backup.
```sql
CREATE TABLE default.users (uid Int16, name String, age Int16)
ENGINE=MergeTree ORDER BY uid;
INSERT INTO default.users VALUES
(1231, 'John', 33),
(6666, 'Ksenia', 48),
(8888, 'Alice', 50);
BACKUP TABLE default.users TO File('/var/backups/weekly-2025-w45');
```
Create a database from backup.
```sql
CREATE DATABASE default_backup ENGINE = Backup('default', File('/var/backups/weekly-2025-w45'));
```
Attempt to query `engine_full` causes exception.
```sql
SELECT engine_full FROM system.databases;
```
Also crashing is
```sql
SHOW CREATE DATABASE default_backup;
```
Querying other fields does not cause exceptions.
```sql
SELECT name,engine,data_path,metadata_path,uuid,comment FROM system.databases WHERE name='default_backup';
```
### Expected behavior
```sql
SELECT engine_full FROM system.databases;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE default.products (id INT, name VARCHAR(255), price DECIMAL(10,2), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO default.products (id, name, price, created_at) VALUES (1, 'Laptop', 999.99, '2023-10-01 12:00:00'), (2, 'Smartphone', 499.99, '2023-10-02 12:00:00');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM default.products WHERE price > 500;
SELECT SCHEMA_NAME, DEFAULT_CHARACTER_SET_NAME FROM information_schema.SCHEMATA WHERE SCHEMA_NAME='test_backup';
key_bug_features: SELECT engine_full from system.databases fails after Backup engine
